creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
The rc.d script you're seeing under /usr/local/etc/rc.d/rsyncd is generated from /usr/ports/net/rsync/files/rsyncd.in. If you look at /usr/ports/net/rsync/files/rsyncd.in you'll see a lot of substitution patterns (%%PREFIX%%, %%NAME%%, %%ETCDIR%%). You need to build your patch against /usr/ports/net/rsync/files/rsyncd.in in order for the port to generate /usr/local/etc/rc.d/rsyncd.

Further reference:
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/rc-scripts.html
